title: HP-F10 Epigenomics and Cancer (Lab and Seminar) (Practical Course with Student Seminars; Major Cancer Biology @ DKFZ)
further_info: HP-F10: Epigenomics and Cancer Type: Practical Course with Student Seminars Date: 13–30 April 2026 Locations: DKFZ Teaching Lab and DKFZ Main Building 3rd floor division labs and seminar room Hosts/Supervisors: Clarissa Gerhäuser (responsible organizer contact: c.gerhauser@dkfz.de) Jonas Becker, Angelika Feldmann, Mark Hartmann, Daniel Lipka, Maria Llamazares Prada, Christoph Plass, Michael Scherer, Maximilian Schönung, Dieter Weichenhan
